name: Close Portrait
description: Tight single or dual portrait. Face and upper body dominant.
hld_patterns: {setting}. A tight portrait, the figure filling the frame.
{setting}. A close composition — face and shoulders, background dissolved.
{setting}. An intimate portrait crop, subject dominant in frame.

1: {subject}, centered, filling the frame, upper body and face dominant.

background_pool: A softly blurred interior wall, warm bokeh from string lights or candles creating golden circles behind the subject, the suggestion of a cozy room without any distinct features, shallow depth of field dissolving everything to color
A natural out-of-focus backdrop of green foliage, dappled light creating soft bokeh circles, the hint of a garden or forest behind, cool tones blending into a wash of sage and amber
A neutral studio-esque wall in muted earth tones, a single soft light source creating a gentle gradient from light to shadow, the background reduced to a smooth tonal field with no distraction
A darkened room behind the subject, shadow dominate, the faint suggestion of a window with sheer fabric diffusing the light, a soft glow rimming one edge, everything else fading to black
action_pool: head tilted slightly to one side
chin dipping, looking up through their lashes
turning their face slowly toward the light
a strand of hair caught between their fingers
eyes closing, a faint smile forming
gaze drifting just past the camera
